title: Ricinocarpus tricholobus
taxonomy: Ricinocarpus tricholobus is a species of plant that belongs to the family Celastraceae. It is a member of the order Celastrales and the class Magnoliopsida. The class Magnoliopsida is a subgroup of the larger group called flowering plants, or angiosperms. Ricinocarpus tricholobus is further classified as a member of the genus Ricinocarpus, which is native to Australia. This classification system is based on the plant's physical characteristics, evolutionary history, and genetic relationships.

intro: Ricinocarpus tricholobus is a plant species, also known as Lannea coromandeliana, that belongs to the Anacardiaceae family.
